name: PivotGrid
description: Cross-tab / pivot table that summarizes flat data into rows x columns x aggregated measures.

api.name: PivotGrid
api.description: Cross-tab / pivot table that summarizes flat data into rows x columns x aggregated measures.

parameters.name: OnCellClick
parameters.description: Invoked when a data cell is clicked. Carries the clicked cell context for drill-down.

events.name: OnCellClick
events.description: Invoked when a data cell is clicked. Carries the clicked cell context for drill-down.

records.name: ColumnLeaf
records.signature:
ColumnLeaf(
        string Label,
        string PathKey,
        object?[] Path,
        IReadOnlyList<TItem> Items,
        bool IsGrandTotal)

records.name: HeaderEntry
records.signature: HeaderEntry(string Label, int ColSpan, int RowSpan, bool IsGrandTotal)

records.name: DisplayRow
records.signature: DisplayRow(RowNode Node, DisplayRowKind Kind, bool Collapsed, int Level, string Label)

examples.title: Sales by region × year
examples.code:
<PivotGrid TItem="Sale"
           Items="_sales"
           RowFields="@(new List<PivotField<Sale>> { new("Region", s => s.Region) })"
           ColumnFields="@(new List<PivotField<Sale>> { new("Year", s => s.Year, v => "FY " + v) })"
           Measures="@(new List<PivotMeasure<Sale>> { new("Revenue", s => s.Amount, PivotAggregate.Sum, d => "$" + d.ToString("N0")) })" />

@code {
    record Sale(string Region, string Country, int Year, int Quarter, decimal Amount, int Units);
    List<Sale> _sales = new() { /* ... */ };
}

examples.title: Multiple measures (sum + count)
examples.code:
<PivotGrid TItem="Sale"
           Items="_sales"
           RowFields="_regionField"
           ColumnFields="_yearField"
           Measures="@(new List<PivotMeasure<Sale>> {
               new("Revenue", s => s.Amount, PivotAggregate.Sum, d => "$" + d.ToString("N0")),
               new("Deals", s => s.Units, PivotAggregate.Count),
           })" />

examples.title: Collapsible nested row groups
examples.code:
<PivotGrid TItem="Sale"
           Items="_sales"
           RowFields="@(new List<PivotField<Sale>> {
               new("Region", s => s.Region),
               new("Country", s => s.Country),
           })"
           ColumnFields="_yearField"
           Measures="_amountMeasure"
           Collapsible="true"
           Compact="true" />

examples.title: Multi-level column hierarchy (Year > Quarter)
examples.code:
<PivotGrid TItem="Sale"
           Items="_sales"
           RowFields="_regionCountryFields"
           ColumnFields="@(new List<PivotField<Sale>> {
               new("Year",    s => s.Year, v => "FY " + v),
               new("Quarter", s => s.Quarter, v => "Q" + v),
           })"
           Measures="_amountMeasure"
           Compact="true" />

mdSummary:
# PivotGrid

Cross-tab / pivot table that summarizes flat data into rows x columns x aggregated measures.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/pivot-grid

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| PivotGrid | Items | `IEnumerable<TItem>?` | `` |  |
| PivotGrid | RowFields | `IReadOnlyList<PivotField<TItem>>` | `Array.Empty<PivotField<TItem>>()` |  |
| PivotGrid | ColumnFields | `IReadOnlyList<PivotField<TItem>>` | `Array.Empty<PivotField<TItem>>()` |  |
| PivotGrid | Measures | `IReadOnlyList<PivotMeasure<TItem>>` | `Array.Empty<PivotMeasure<TItem>>()` |  |
| PivotGrid | ShowRowGrandTotal | `bool` | `true` |  |
| PivotGrid | ShowColumnGrandTotal | `bool` | `true` |  |
| PivotGrid | ShowSubtotals | `bool` | `true` |  |
| PivotGrid | Collapsible | `bool` | `true` |  |
| PivotGrid | Compact | `bool` | `` |  |
| PivotGrid | GrandTotalLabel | `string?` | `` |  |
| PivotGrid | EmptyContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| PivotGrid | OnCellClick | `EventCallback<PivotCellClickArgs>` | `` | Invoked when a data cell is clicked. Carries the clicked cell context for drill-down. |
| PivotGrid | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| PivotGrid | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `EmptyContent` (PivotGrid) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `OnCellClick` (`EventCallback<PivotCellClickArgs>`) — Invoked when a data cell is clicked. Carries the clicked cell context for drill-down.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<PivotGrid />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/PivotGrid/PivotCellClickArgs.cs`
- `UI/PivotGrid/PivotField.cs`
- `UI/PivotGrid/PivotGrid.razor`
- `UI/PivotGrid/PivotMeasure.cs`
